title: The King Sword
description: This mod adds a very powerful sword and a real port of the original Avaritia (1.7.10). It also includes a new version of Avaritia with my own buffs, making the armor set extremely powerful.
body:
## ⚔️ The King Sword: Avaritia Reborn & Beyond
Hey everyone, I'm Xilombo, and you’ve just found the endgame to end all endgames.

This mod isn’t just a simple collection of "OP" gear—it is the absolute authority on power. I have brought a faithful port of the original Avaritia (1.7.10) to modern Minecraft, but the crown jewel of this mod is the The King Sword.

<details>
<summary>👑 The King Sword</summary>

**Hard-Coded Death**: Using advanced CoreMod (ASM) technology, this blade targets the very soul of entities (isAlive, getHealth, isDeadOrDying).

**Bypasses Everything**: It doesn't care about "Infinite Health," "Invulnerability," or "Damage Cancellation." If it hits, the entity simply ceases to exist.

**Cosmos Power**: Featuring a stunning RGB Animated Tooltip and a custom-coded strike logic, it is the most powerful weapon ever created in the history of modding.
</details>


<details>
<summary>💎 What else is inside?</summary>
  
**Classic Avaritia Port**: Relive the glory of the 1.7.10 version with original textures and mechanics, now fully compatible with 1.20.1.

**Avaritia Buffed Set**: A revamped version of the Infinity Armor. Even with 11 anti-removal Mixins already implemented, I’m constantly pushing to make this defense even more unbreakable.

**Coremod**: I modificated getHealth method, isAlive method and isDeadOrDying method with ILaunchPluginService(getHealth always return Float.POSITIVE_INFINITY, isAlive always return true and isDeadOrDying always return false)

**Unstoppable Defense**: This gear is designed to protect you from the most "broken" mods out there.
</details>



### 🚀 Why choose this mod?
If you missed the feeling of being a true god in Minecraft, your search ends here. Whether you want the classic nostalgia or the new, "buffed" reality of the The King Sword, this mod delivers absolute dominance with style.

## Which mods does my gear beat?
This mod overpowers Omnimobs(All versions by Flashfur), MoreAvaritia (All Versions by wzz), and ArcaneVortex (All versions by TwoQian). But sometimes wins Pig2 (CurseForge version by kakiku2021) in most encounters.
